task: Evaluate two statements: (1) The report claims revenue rose 10%. (2) The spreadsheet shows a 5% decline. Resolve the contradiction.
reasoning_trace: Audit spreadsheet formulas: confirm 5% decline is correct.
Investigate report: discover it used preliminary data.
Resolve: report is outdated; issue correction.
answer: Spreadsheet is correct (5% decline); report used outdated preliminary data. Issue correction.
meta_lesson: Trace contradictory claims back to data provenance and document the reconciled source.

task: Two sensors report temperatures: Sensor A 75°C, Sensor B 60°C for the same component. Determine which reading to trust.
reasoning_trace: Check calibration logs: Sensor A last calibrated 6 months ago, Sensor B last week.
Conclude Sensor A drifted high; flag for recalibration.
Report trusted reading: 62°C from thermal camera/Sensor B.
answer: Trust Sensor B (~62°C); Sensor A is uncalibrated and reading high.
meta_lesson: Use calibration history and independent measurements to resolve conflicting sensor outputs.
